name: voxel-engine-kit
description: Genre-neutral voxel/three.js engine layer extracted from the voxel beat-em-up: renderer + bloom pipeline, voxel meshing, character builders, particles, smears, audio synth, settings, quality tiers, skybox/environment, AABB collision, and a vectorized (8-way) hitbox. A starting platform for a new game, not a game.
//: three is vendored under lib/three (offline). Install it only if you want editor/tooling type resolution.
